description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS CI that triggers on push to main and on pull requests to main, including tags. The workflow runs on macos-latest with a matrix strategy for different LLVM versions. It checks out the repository, detects package metadata, installs dependencies, runs a CI task including end-to-end tests, and conditionally publishes a package to Cloudsmith if the CLOUDSMITH_API_KEY is set. Finally, it moves the package and attaches it to the workflow run.
